creator: bcr@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->analyzed

Sorry, I was a little bit behind on emails, hence the long response time. 
You are correct, Slip is still in the screenshot. I do not know whether 
this can be fixed solely by us doc folks (it has to be removed in  
sysinstall first, before we can take a new screenshot), but I'm going to 
investigate the issue.  
Meanwhile, I re-open this PR and set its status to analyzed until we've 
found a fix.
